title: Objects, Prototypes, Properties, and Data Shape · Language Lens: Prototype Chain
summary: Model service records and shared behavior while defending against accidental mutation and unsafe property input. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js prototype chain increment in a validated service-record domain model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace property lookup and method sharing through the prototype chain without class-only mental models.
Use object destructuring, rest, and spread while accounting for shallow copies, accessors, and overwrite order.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
